name: Jetstream
description_short: JetStream FCU is a Miami-Dade and Puerto Rico–based federal credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with 75 years of operational history and $238M in assets.
description_long: JetStream Federal Credit Union has operated for 75 years as a member-owned financial institution serving Miami-Dade County, Florida, and select areas of Puerto Rico (Carolina, Trujillo Alto, and San Juan). The credit union has built $238M in assets and maintains a 5-star rating from Bauer Financial. Membership is open to residents, workers, students, and those who worship in eligible geographic areas, as well as immediate family members of existing members and employees of select employer groups. JetStream offers a comprehensive suite of consumer banking products including free checking and membership savings accounts, auto loans (new and used cars), personal loans, home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), and credit cards. The institution provides online banking at no charge, access to 100,000+ fee-free ATMs and branches through shared branching networks, and digital loan calculators. Current advertised rates include auto loans from 4.99% (new) and 5.24% (used), personal loans from 9.99%, HELOCs from 2.99%, and credit cards from 12.40%. The credit union also offers EasyVest investment services and a referral rewards program ($50 per successful referral). JetStream differentiates itself through its community focus, geographic accessibility in underserved Puerto Rico markets, and member-owned structure typical of credit unions. The institution emphasizes security, community partnerships (e.g., with Kristi House for child abuse prevention), and bilingual services (English/Spanish). The 75-year operational history and maintained 5-star financial rating provide stability markers. The routing number 267080355 confirms federal credit union status. As a credit union, JetStream serves a defined membership base with geographic restrictions, making it inaccessible to those outside Miami-Dade or Puerto Rico unless they qualify through employment or family membership. Rate competitiveness varies by product and borrower profile. The institution's $238M asset base is modest relative to large national banks, though appropriate for a regional credit union. Prospective members should confirm eligibility before applying, as applications trigger credit inquiries.
services: New car auto loans (4.99% starting rate)
Used car auto loans (5.24% starting rate)
Home equity lines of credit (HELOCs, 2.99% starting rate)
pros: Access to 100,000+ fee-free ATMs and branches through credit union networks nationwide
Free checking and membership savings accounts with no monthly fees
5-star rating from Bauer Financial (2024) confirming financial stability
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.99% for new vehicles and 5.24% for used
Bilingual support (English/Spanish) and service in underserved Puerto Rico markets
Member-owned cooperative structure aligned with consumer interests rather than profit maximization
HELOC availability from 2.99% for members with home equity
cons: Geographic membership restrictions limit access to Miami-Dade County, Florida, and three Puerto Rico municipalities unless qualifying through employment or family
Modest $238M asset base compared to national banks may limit product innovation and branch expansion
Credit card rates starting at 12.40% are not exceptionally competitive versus major card issuers
Personal loan rates from 9.99% fall into mid-range pricing and may not offer best available rates for excellent-credit borrowers
Website content does not disclose account minimum balances, overdraft fees, or other account terms clearly
best_for: Miami-Dade County residents seeking fee-free checking and access to shared credit union ATM networks
Puerto Rico residents (Carolina, Trujillo Alto, San Juan) seeking bilingual banking and local relationship banking
Auto buyers with decent credit seeking competitive rates on vehicle financing
Homeowners with equity seeking HELOCs for cash access at favorable rates
diagnosis: JetStream FCU is best for Miami-Dade residents and Puerto Rico–based consumers who qualify for membership and value fee-free banking, community relationships, and credit union ownership. The main caveat is strict geographic and eligibility restrictions that exclude applicants outside defined service areas unless employed by select employers or related to current members.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: JetStream FCU is a Miami-Dade and Puerto Rico-based federal credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards.
